title: Noma Sommos

{{Quote|Word is that Admirals Veltraa and Sommos are reforming for a last stand to protect Taris, but it's not looking good.|Dallan Morvis|<ref name="kotor8" />}}
'''Noma Sommos''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Admiral/Legends|admiral]] in the [[Republic Navy/Legends|Republic Navy]] who served in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] during the [[Mandalorian Wars]]. In [[3964 BBY]], Sommos was present on the front lines of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic's]] war with the [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] warrior clans when the Mandalorians began a massive offensive aimed at taking the valuable [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Taris/Legends|Taris]]. Sommos and Admiral [[Jimas Veltraa]] reformed what was left of the Outer Rim [[Fleet/Legends|fleets]] into a force meant to protect Taris, but the Mandalorians were still able to overcome them and [[Taris Siege|besiege]] the world. Although Sommos survived the fighting, she was gravely wounded and sent to recover at a field [[Medcenter/Legends|hospital]] on the planet [[Wayland/Legends|Wayland]], later filing a formal complaint about the presence of [[Fringer/Legends|fringers]] in Republic [[Navy/Legends|naval]] groups.

==Biography==
{{Quote|Admiral Noma Sommos, inactive since her injuries following the collapse of the line on the Outer Rim, filed an official complaint from her field hospital on Wayland over the growing presence of fringers, or freelance tradespeople, in naval groups.|An article in ''[[The Admiral's List]]''|<ref name="jimas" />}}
Noma Sommos was an [[Admiral/Legends|admiral]] in the [[Republic Navy/Legends|Republic Navy]] who served in the era following the [[Great Sith War/Legends|Great Sith War]]. After becoming an admiral, Sommos and [[Gender/Legends|her]] staff employed a young [[Naval Academy]] graduate named [[Dallan Morvis]] as a junior liaison with a [[Vanjervalis Systems]] design team.<ref name="handbook">''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic Handbook]]''</ref> Although the epic battles with the [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] had long past by [[3964 BBY]], the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] faced a new threat at the edge of its borders—the [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] warrior clans, which had carved out a sizable empire of their own before encroaching upon Republic [[Realspace/Legends|space]]. As the Mandalorians threatened resource [[Planet/Legends|worlds]] near the valuable [[Ecumenopolis/Legends|ecumenopolis]] of [[Taris/Legends|Taris]],<ref name="tea">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref> the Republic [[Navy/Legends|Navy]] set up a defensive cordon known as the [[Jebble-Vanquo-Tarnith line]]. Sommos was serving along this border by the [[Time/Legends|time]] the Mandalorians finally began their advance, [[Battle of Vanquo|attacking]] the planet [[Vanquo]] in a diversionary tactic to open up a path to Taris.<ref name="kotor8" />

The line soon collapsed—Sommos and Admiral [[Jimas Veltraa]] responded by reforming what was left of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] [[Fleet/Legends|fleets]] into a makeshift force meant to protect Taris. Veltraa was [[Death/Legends|killed]] in the Mandalorian [[Taris Siege|siege]], while Sommos was wounded and sent to recover in a [[Medcenter/Legends|hospital]] on the planet [[Wayland/Legends|Wayland]]. Sommos was inactive for some time following her injury over Taris and, while at her field hospital on Wayland, filed an official complaint over the growing presence of freelance tradespeople, or "[[Fringer/Legends|fringers]]," in Republic naval groups. Sommos complained that irregular and unaffiliated units provided logistical complications and provisioning problems, while their protection was inconsistent with the combat and spacelift duties of the Republic Navy—Republic defense official [[Catronus Steffans]], responding to the issue, was noncommittal on a course of action.<ref name="jimas" />

==Personality and traits==
{{Quote|The combat and spacelift duties of the navy are inconsistent with providing protection for irregular and unaffiliated units.|Noma Sommos|<ref name="jimas" />}}
Noma Sommos was known for her opposition to freelance fringer groups among the Republic Navy, going so far as to file an official complaint as she recovered following her injuries over Taris, citing logistical problems caused by their presence.<ref name="jimas" />

==Behind the scenes==
Admiral Sommos was first mentioned in [[Knights of the Old Republic 8|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 8]], a [[Star Wars comic books|comic]] written by [[John Jackson Miller]] and released in [[2006]].<ref name="kotor8" /> ''[[The Admiral's List: Jimas Veltraa Memorial Edition]]'', an [[in-universe]] news report appearing on the last page of [[Knights of the Old Republic 13|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 13]], first provided the character's first name as "Noma."<ref name="jimas" /> Sommos was also mentioned in Miller's [[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic Handbook|''Knights of the Old Republic Handbook'']],<ref name="handbook" /> along with an entry in ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''.<ref name="cswe">{{CSWECite|III|179|Sommos, Noma}}</ref>
